channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Diesel shortages and global oil tensions keep Australian fuel markets unsettled
item.description: Diesel prices across Australia have risen again after a brief drop last week, highlighting ongoing volatility despite the Albanese government’s temporary reduction in fuel excise. Energy Minister Chri...

item.title: IED Blast Injures Five Police Officers in Lakki Marwat Patrol
item.description: In a troubling incident on Tuesday in Shahbazkhel town, Lakki Marwat, at least five policemen, including an assistant sub-inspector, sustained injuries due to an improvised explosive device (IED) atta...

item.title: Boxing Controversy: Accusations of Scripting Erupt After Majembe vs. Mbavu Destroyer Match
item.description: Things got real messy after the boxing match between Majembe and Mbavu Destroyer at the Kasarani Indoor Sports Stadium. While Majembe emerged victorious via TKO, controversy erupted immediately afterw...

item.title: Trump Claims God Supports U.S. Actions in Iran, Cites Nobel Prize Nomination and Saved Lives
item.description: During a White House press conference on Monday, President Donald Trump was asked by a reporter whether he believes that God supports the United States' military actions in Iran. Trump responded affir...

item.title: UK watchdog urges parents to teach children about online privacy as a vital life skill
item.description: The UK's Information Commissioner's Office (ICO) has urged parents to treat online privacy education for children with the same importance as traditional safety lessons like road safety or 'stranger d...

item.title: OpenAI Alumni Launch $100M Venture Fund Backing Early AI Startups
item.description: A group of former OpenAI employees has launched a new venture capital fund named Zero Shot, with a target size of $100 million. The fund's co-founding team consists of several OpenAI veterans, includi...

item.title: Calls grow for upgrades to Sea to Sky Highway after rising crash rates
item.description: The Sea to Sky Highway, connecting Vancouver and Whistler, has seen a worrying rise in accidents, with 167 crashes reported in 2024 according to ICBC data. Nearly half of these incidents resulted in i...

item.title: Supreme Court urged to clarify limits of Kenya’s cyber law and online freedom
item.description: The editorial explores the ongoing debate about how Kenya should balance online freedom and accountability under the Computer Misuse and Cybercrimes (Amendment) Act, 2024. It argues that while Kenyans...

item.title: ED attaches ₹944 crore worth of assets in Piyush Colonisers fraud case
item.description: The Enforcement Directorate (ED) has provisionally attached assets worth ₹944 crore held by Piyush Colonisers Limited and its former promoters in connection with an alleged cheating case. The seized a...

item.title: Shashi Tharoor predicts Congress lead in Kerala Assembly elections despite close contest
item.description: In an interview with The Hindu on April 6, 2026, Congress leader Shashi Tharoor discussed his party's prospects in the upcoming Kerala Assembly elections. Tharoor emphasized that while the victory mig...

item.title: Manchester United Plans to Sell Eight Players to Fund Move for Elliot Anderson
item.description: Manchester United is preparing to offload up to eight players in the upcoming transfer window as part of their strategy to raise funds for key signings. Among their top targets is Elliot Anderson, cur...

item.title: FIA Probe Expanded Following Parliamentary Panel's Concerns Over FBR Cigarette Theft
item.description: A parliamentary committee in Pakistan has directed the Federal Investigation Agency (FIA) to broaden its investigation into the theft of cigarette cartons from the Federal Board of Revenue (FBR). The ...

item.title: Study of 789 Shark Tank Pitches Shows Narcissistic Admiration Boosts Funding Chances While Rivalry Hurts Them
item.description: A recent academic study analyzed 789 entrepreneur pitches from 12 seasons of the reality TV show 'Shark Tank' to explore how narcissistic personality traits influence investors' decisions. Researchers...

item.title: NASA’s Artemis II Astronauts Achieve Record Distance from Earth During Moon Flyby
item.description: NASA’s Artemis II mission has made history by sending four astronauts deeper into space than any humans ever have. On April 7, 2026, the crew, consisting of US astronauts Reid Wiseman, Victor Glover, ...

item.title: Artemis II Mission Sets New Human Space Travel Distance Record
item.description: NASA's Artemis II mission has surpassed the Apollo 13 record, setting a new benchmark for the farthest distance humans have traveled from Earth. The crew—Reid Wiseman, Victor Glover, Christina Koch, a...

item.title: Kitale Mourns Popular Biker Gustavo Rides Following Tragic Northern Bypass Accident
item.description: In Kitale, tearful scenes marked the burial of Elvis Juma, popularly known as Gustavo Rides or Luhya Kidd, who tragically died alongside his wife Diana in a motorcycle accident on the Northern Bypass....

item.title: Deontay Wilder edges Chisora and eyes long-awaited fight with Anthony Joshua
item.description: Deontay Wilder reignited calls for a long-awaited clash with fellow former heavyweight champion Anthony Joshua after securing a hard-fought split-decision win over Derek Chisora in London on Saturday....

item.title: Developments in the 2026 Iran Conflict and U.S. Diplomatic Reactions
item.description: The Wall Street Journal’s live coverage focuses on escalating military and diplomatic tensions between Iran and several Western powers in early 2026. Reports indicate that Iran has expanded its missil...

item.title: Calls to reform UK driving laws after confusion over careless and dangerous driving cases
item.description: The article argues that the UK’s current framework for prosecuting fatal driving cases is too vague, inconsistent and poorly understood. Drawing on two recent court cases, the author says the differen...

item.title: Ben Roberts-Smith Charged with War Crimes Following Investigation
item.description: Former Australian Special Air Service (SAS) soldier Ben Roberts-Smith has been arrested and charged with war crimes, marking a significant development in a long-running investigation into allegations ...
